name: All-American Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Spray a 9-inch deep-dish pie plate with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, granulated sugar, flour, lemon zest, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix well.
4. Peel, core, and thinly slice apples. Add apples to the sugar mixture; stir until coated. Stir in raisins. Spoon into prepared pie plate.
5. Place pie crust on top of filling. Trim edges, pressing against the edge of the pan. Using a sharp knife, cut steam vents in the pie crust. To glaze, lightly brush the pie crust with beaten egg. Sprinkle with sugar.
6. Bake until the pie crust is golden brown, about 35 to 40 minutes. Place on a wire rack and cool for 30 minutes. Serve warm.
